content:
📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents purges from being an easy way out—someone else must be involved.
✔ Encourages faction and archetype negotiations, creating alliances and rivalries.
✔ Maintains balance—one player’s transformation always affects another.

📜 3. Archetype Purges Appear Randomly in the Sequence of the Day

📜 A purge event will be inserted randomly into the day’s class structure, meaning players must be ready at all times.

✔ How Random Purges Work:
• Each class, a single purge slot exists but appears at random.
• If no one is ready to purge, the opportunity disappears.
• If multiple people want to purge, they must battle for it (debate, skill check, persuasion).
• If no valid sacrifice is found, the purge is denied.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Prevents players from planning around purges too easily.
✔ Adds an element of unpredictability—players must stay prepared.
✔ Forces immediate decision-making—either take the chance or lose it.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 539 (chunk 539/555)
